mapper.select: select a.id,a.biz_id, a.title, a.score, a.create_time,a.type,a.status,a.start_time,a.end_time, COUNT(ar.id) AS comment_count ,count(sp.student_id) as exam_sum ,count(hw.id) as homework_sum from activity a LEFT JOIN activity_discussion_record ar ON a.id = ar.activity_id left join student_paper sp on sp.activity_id = a.id left join homework hw on hw.activity_id = a.id where a.course_id = #{id} and a.status != 0 GROUP BY a.id
mapper.update: update activity set status = 0 where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into activity_discussion_record(activity_id, student_id, submit_time,content) values(#{activityId}, #{studentId}, #{submitTime},#{content})
mapper.select: select a.id, u.nickname,u.avatar ,a.submit_time,a.content from activity_discussion_record a left JOIN `user` u ON u.id = a.student_id where a.activity_id = #{id}
select score from activity where id = #{activityId}
select * from activity_discussion_record where student_id = #{studentId} and activity_id = #{activityId}
select end_time from activity where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update activity set start_time = #{startTime},end_time = #{endTime} where id = #{id} and status != 0
mapper.select: select start_time from activity where id = #{activityId}
select course_id from activity where id = #{activityId}
